name: Walhalla State Fish Hatchery pier
notes: ADA-accessible fishing pier, picnic area and restrooms at the hatchery.

name: Burrells Ford Campground (Chattooga River)
notes: Walk-in access off SC 107; stocked Mar-Nov around the bridge.

name: Saluda Shoals Park (Lower Saluda River)
notes: Popular winter trout reach below Lake Murray dam; county park fee.

name: Jones Gap State Park (Middle Saluda River)
notes: Trailhead access to SC's first scenic river; park admission.

name: Eastatoe Creek Heritage Preserve trailhead
notes: SCDNR Heritage Trust preserve; wild rainbow gorge (approx. trailhead).
